zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Marley於大約1523年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親Richard Marley20歲，母親Eleanor Millot22歲。她於大約1534年與Roger Blakiston of Gibside結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Marley于大约1523年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲Richard Marley20岁，母亲Eleanor Millot22岁。她于大约1534年与Roger Blakiston of Gibside结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, for example in Devon, Kent, and Yorkshire. According to Ekwall, the first element of these placenames is respectively Old English (ge)mǣre ‘boundary’, myrig ‘pleasant’, and mearth ‘(pine) marten’. The second element in each case is Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This surname was taken to Ireland by a Northumbrian family who settled there in the 17th century.

variants.name: Marlow
meanings: English: habitational name from the place in Buckinghamshire on the Thames, named in Old English with mere ‘lake, pool’ + lāfe ‘remnants, leavings’, i.e. a boggy area remaining after a lake had been drained. There has been some confusion with Marley .
Americanized form of French Canadian   Marleau  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Marley was born about 1523, in Durham, England, her father, Richard Marley, was 20 and her mother, Eleanor Millot, was 22. She married Roger Blakiston of Gibside about 1534. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1575, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Marley est née environ 1523, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Richard Marley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Millot, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Blakiston of Gibside environ 1534. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1575, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Marley um 1523 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Marley 20 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Millot 22. Sie hat um 1534 Roger Blakiston of Gibside geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1575 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Marley è nata il circa 1523 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Richard Marley, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Millot, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Roger Blakiston of Gibside circa 1534. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1575, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Marleyが約1523年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Richard Marleyは20歳，母Eleanor Millotは22歳であった。約1534年にRoger Blakiston of Gibsideと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Marley(이)가 대략 1523년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Marley(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Millot(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 Roger Blakiston of Gibside(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Marley nasceu aproximadamente 1523, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Marley, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Millot, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Blakiston of Gibside aproximadamente 1534. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1575, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Marley родилась около 1523 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Marley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Millot, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Blakiston of Gibside около 1534 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1575 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Marley nació aproximadamente 1523, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Marley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Eleanor Millot, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roger Blakiston of Gibside aproximadamente 1534. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1575, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
